exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Template franchise agreement with exhibits (Territory, Right of First Offer, Management Company Documents). 20-year term, no renewal.

exhibits.name: Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: Multi-unit development agreement. Typically 2-6 year term.

exhibits.name: Hotel Technology Agreement
exhibits.notes: Includes Microsoft Participation Agreement, Canary Participation Agreement (Hotel Subscription Agreement), Project Management Services SOW. 3-year initial term, coterminous with FA.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Two sets of audited financial statements. Set 1: FY2024 and FY2023 (pages 198-211). Set 2: FY2023 and FY2022 (pages 213-225). Unqualified opinion with emphasis of matter on related party transactions. LLC entity not subject to federal income tax.

exhibits.name: Brand Standards Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for 130-page Standards Manual (not included in FDD).

exhibits.name: List of State Agencies / Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: State regulatory agencies and agents for service of process.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document, Riders to Franchise Agreement, and State Riders to Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: 12 states: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin. Includes FDD addenda (pages 232-245), FA riders (pages 246-268), DA riders (pages 269-288).

exhibits.name: Franchisee Guaranty
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty form. Required if franchisee is entity. Required if hotel owned by different entity than franchisee.

exhibits.name: Form of General Release
exhibits.notes: Required upon transfer. Release of claims against franchisor and affiliates.

exhibits.name: List of EXTENDED STAY AMERICA PREMIER SUITES Franchisees as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: Current franchisee list with names, addresses, phone numbers.

exhibits.name: List of EXTENDED STAY AMERICA PREMIER SUITES Franchisees Who Left the System as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: Referenced in TOC (page 8) but no separate exhibit section found in document body. Likely empty — zero terminations/non-renewals in all reported years. May be a blank page or omitted.

michigan_notice.notes: Michigan Franchise Investment Law notice included in front matter, not in Exhibit G. Covers good cause termination, fair market value on non-renewal, venue restriction, transfer restrictions.

state_effective_dates.notes: Separate state effective dates page between Exhibit J/K and Receipts.
